name: mazhen-skills
description: Personal skills collection for Claude Code - search tools, prompt generators, and utilities

plugins.name: article-illustrator-prompts
plugins.description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, and generates illustration prompts using Type × Style two-dimension approach

plugins.name: cover-image-prompts
plugins.description: Generates article cover image prompts with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood)

plugins.name: drawio
plugins.description: Generate draw.io diagrams as .drawio files, optionally export to PNG/SVG/PDF with embedded XML

plugins.name: felo-search
plugins.description: Felo AI real-time web search for questions requiring current/live information

plugins.name: felo-web-fetch
plugins.description: Extract web page content as markdown, HTML, or plain text using Felo AI

plugins.name: infographic-prompts
plugins.description: Generates professional infographic drawing prompts with 21 layout types and 20 visual styles

plugins.name: searxng
plugins.description: Privacy-respecting metasearch using your authenticated SearXNG instance

plugins.name: xhs-prompts
plugins.description: Generates drawing prompts for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) infographic series

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Create and manage handoff documents for seamless work continuity. Triggered by 'create handoff', 'save handoff', 'load handoff', '继续工作', etc.
